metadata.description: Persistent memory + AST summarization for Claude Code — tree-sitter structural analysis (90%+ token reduction), cross-session recall, symbol indexing

plugins.name: agora-code
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin: persistent memory + tree-sitter AST summarization. Intercepts large file reads and replaces them with structural outlines (functions, classes, line numbers) for 90%+ token reduction. Auto-injects session context on start, recalls learnings on every prompt, and digests conversations into searchable memory across sessions.
